app.name: SOMO
conn.cellular2g: Sadarwa a hankali — daidaitawa mai sauƙi
conn.offline: Babu sadarwa — an adana komai a wayarka
auth.phoneHint: Za mu aiko maka lamba ta SMS. Ba a buƙatar kalmar sirri.

dna.title: Gudun DNA na Aji
dna.intro: Amsa tambayoyi 5 na murya game da ajinka. SOMO na amfani da su don koyar da kai.
dna.recording: Ana saurare… yi magana da yardar kaina
today.title: Yau
today.noPack: Ba a shigar da fakitin darasi ba tukuna. Bincika fakitoci don farawa.
mirror.title: Madubin Minti 3
mirror.intro: Tunani guda uku na minti ɗaya game da ranarka. Yi magana ko rubuta.
coach.title: Tambayi Kocin
coach.asksLeft: Tambayoyi {count} kyauta sun rage wannan makon
paywall.limitTitle: Ka yi amfani da tambayoyinka na kyauta na wannan makon
paywall.limitBody: SOMO Plus na ba ka horo mara iyaka, kowane fakiti, da cikakken amfani ba tare da sadarwa ba.
paywall.annualNudge: Biya na shekara ka sami wata 2 kyauta
packs.title: Fakitocin darasi
packs.verifyFailed: Wannan fakitin ya gaza gwajin tsaro kuma ba a shigar da shi ba.
share.title: Raba SOMO
share.rewardBoth: Ku duka za ku sami kwana {days} na Plus idan sun shiga

settings.title: Saituna
error.offlineAction: Ba ka da sadarwa. Za a aika wannan idan ka sake haɗawa.
error.generic: Wani abu ya faru. An adana aikinka.
